title: Speaking - Part 4
description: The examiner will ask you questions related to the theme from Part 3. Express and develop your opinions with your partner.

content.task: Discussion on fashion industry and consumerism.

questions.question: Do you think consumer culture is driving people to buy more than they need, and what can be done to change this behaviour?
How do you think social media and celebrity culture influence people's attitudes towards fashion and spending?

script.text: Do you think consumer culture is driving people to buy more than they need, and what can be done to change this behaviour?
Thank you. That is the end of the test.
